flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Spalding University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (597 vs 798).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Spalding University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (683 → 583).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Spalding University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Spalding University rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 (30.2% → 41.7%).
